_README: Ready-to-use JSON-LD snippets for izharfoster.com. Each block is one <script type="application/ld+json">…</script> insertion. Replace [PLACEHOLDER] values before publishing.

1_certifications_page._purpose: Mark ISO 9001 / 14001 / 45001 / EN 14509 / CE / ASHRAE as Organization-level credentials

hasCredential.name: ISO 45001:2018 — Occupational Health and Safety Management System
EN 14509:2013 — Self-supporting double-skin metal-faced insulating panels

recognizedBy.name: ASHRAE — American Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air-Conditioning Engineers

2_pir_panel_certification_inline._insert_location: Update existing Product schema — add hasCertification array
2_pir_panel_certification_inline._purpose: Per April 2025 Google Product Certification spec — declare panel-level EN 14509 conformance
2_pir_panel_certification_inline._diff_instruction: Inside the Product object, add this property alongside brand/manufacturer:

hasCertification.name: EN 14509:2013 conformance
hasCertification.about: Self-supporting double-skin metal-faced insulating panels, factory-made, of rigid PIR foam core. Bond strength, fire reaction, thermal conductivity per EN 14509 test methods.

hasCertification.name: CE Marking
hasCertification.about: European Conformity for sandwich panels per Construction Products Regulation (EU) 305/2011.

additionalProperty.name: Thermal conductivity (λ, aged per BS EN 14509)

3_blog_index_collection._purpose: Declare the content hub and list all 11 posts so Google understands the Blog as an entity

schema.name: Izhar Foster — Cold Chain Engineering Insights
schema.description: Engineering-led writing on cold storage, refrigeration, PIR sandwich panels, and the cold chain in Pakistan.

blogPost.headline: Cold Storage Cost in Pakistan — 2026 Buyer's Guide
Blast Freezer vs Blast Chiller — Pakistan Guide
Cold Storage Solutions Pakistan — Demand Rising
PIR Panels — Thermal Efficiency and Smart Building
Refrigeration Systems and the Cold Chain in Pakistan
CA Stores — A Game Changer for Pakistan Agriculture
Insulated Doors — Energy Efficiency in Cold Storage
Insulated Industrial Doors — Types & Benefits Guide
Prefabricated Structures — Smart Construction in Pakistan

4_blog_author_person_template._insert_location: Replace existing BlogPosting.author Organization with Person
4_blog_author_person_template._purpose: E-E-A-T — Google increasingly favours identifiable human authors. Adopt only if you can publish a real bio page at /team/[slug]

author.name: [Author Full Name]
author.jobTitle: [e.g., Senior Refrigeration Engineer / Head of Engineering / Cold Chain Consultant]

5_service_page_id_reference._purpose: Replace inline Organization with @id reference so all service Product schemas point to one canonical Organization

6_city_page_service_replacement._purpose: Replace inappropriate LocalBusiness (no physical office) with Service + areaServed
6_city_page_service_replacement._remove: The existing LocalBusiness block claiming a Karachi/Lahore address

_insert.name: Cold Storage in Karachi — Izhar Foster
_insert.description: Design, manufacture, and turnkey installation of cold storage, blast freezers, and refrigeration plants for Karachi-based food, pharma, beverage, and 3PL operators. Delivered from Izhar Foster's Lahore plant.

audience.name: Food processors, pharmaceutical manufacturers, beverage bottlers, 3PL operators, agri-export businesses

8_remove_howto_block._purpose: Delete the HowTo schema block — rich results retired September 2023
8_remove_howto_block._action: Find and delete the entire <script type="application/ld+json"> block whose root @type is "HowTo". The block is around lines 200-210 (between FAQPage and BreadcrumbList).
8_remove_howto_block._keep: FAQPage, SoftwareApplication, and BreadcrumbList blocks on the same page are valid — leave them.

9_remove_dataset_block._purpose: Delete or demote the Dataset schema — rich results retired late 2025
9_remove_dataset_block._action: The 144-commodity reference table is genuinely useful content. Two options: (a) delete the Dataset <script> block entirely, or (b) keep the data on-page as a regular HTML <table> for crawlers/AI to parse, without the Dataset markup. Choose (a) for a cleaner audit; choose (b) if the table is already a strong AI-citation asset.
